name: juniper_srx_firewall
explanation: Juniper SRX Firewall is a logs-only vendor security tile. The spec only defines a `logs` template (UDP syslog listener on a user-supplied port, tagged `ndm_syslog:true`) and ships no Agent metric check (`datadog_checks/juniper_srx_firewall/` contains only `__about__.py` and `__init__.py`). There is no upstream service endpoint for the Agent to probe; logs are forwarded from the SRX device to the Agent's syslog listener. Auto-config in the network-probe sense does not apply — the operator must point the firewall at the Agent's listener port out-of-band.
notes: Logs-only vendor security tile; no metric check. Same shape as ivanti_connect_secure.
